title: Junior Business Development Manager at IndiGrid

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at IndiGrid
jsonLd.description:
IndiGrid, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IndiGrid:
IndiGrid is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGrid!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
